projects.title: Traceface
projects.desc: Real-time facial recognition system leveraging YOLOv8 and DeepFace. Implemented parallel processing architecture achieving 15+ FPS with 97.35% accuracy on the LFW dataset, integrated with ChromaDB for efficient embedding storage.

projects.title: Email Priority Ranking with Neural Networks
projects.desc: Multivariate email prioritization system using CNN ensemble and SimCSE-BERT models to classify emails into priority tiers based on sentiment and urgency scoring. Auto-labeling pipeline with BART-MNLI and VADER sentiment analysis on 500K Enron emails. Modular architecture combining urgency detection (IT tickets) and sentiment analysis (Amazon reviews) with tunable weighting parameters.

honours: Best PLA Computer Science — Worcester Polytechnic Institute, 2024/2025
